message:
refactor(mail_ui): use Option::unwrap_or_else for live_pool fallback

The previous `map_or_else(default, identity)` shape was hard to read:
the "Some" closure was just `|pool| pool` acting as identity, and the
real logic lived in the "None" closure. Switched to
`unwrap_or_else(|| …)` so the happy path is a bare `live_pool_owner`
reference and the fallback is the only closure. Same runtime
behaviour; just a cleaner surface.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
